signals.headline: Bitcoin surges past $76K, sharply reducing Polymarket odds of dipping to $60K in April to 0% YES | NO | HIGH confidence*
signals.raw:
Bitcoin surges past $76K, sharply reducing Polymarket odds of dipping to $60K in April to 0% YES | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Bitcoin's price broke above $76,000, verifiable via market data and @BTCtreasuries, challenging predictions of a $60K drop by April end (12 days remaining as of latest report).[1]  
This momentum shift has compressed YES odds to near-zero on the relevant Polymarket contract,
